players.name: Raya
players.note: Golden Glove holder. Eighteen clean sheets in the title season.

players.name: Hein
players.note: Cup keeper. Reliable when called on.

players.name: Saliba
players.note: The platform everything is built on. Barely missed a minute.

players.name: Gabriel
players.note: Set-piece menace at both ends. The league's best duelling centre-half.

players.name: White
players.availabilityNote: Knee — managed in pre-season, expected for opening day
players.note: Underlaps, overlaps, and the best long throw at the club.

players.name: Zinchenko
players.note: Inverts into midfield to make the build-up sing.

players.name: Tomiyasu
players.availabilityNote: Calf — back in full training late August
players.note: The squad's quiet Swiss army knife — covers every defensive slot.

players.name: Rice
players.note: Played every league game of the title season. The engine and the shield.

players.name: Ødegaard
players.note: Captain. Twenty-two assists — the most by any player in the league.

players.name: Trossard
players.note: The finisher of broken games. Eleven goals, most from the bench.

players.name: Merino
players.note: Aerial control in both boxes; the late-game closer.

players.name: Saka
players.note: Starboy. 24 goals and 18 assists in the title year. Contract talks ongoing.

players.name: Martinelli
players.note: Back to his terrifying best — 21 goals, most of them in transition.

players.name: Havertz
players.note: Thirty-six goals. The signing nobody believed in became the league's best nine.

players.name: Jesus
players.availabilityNote: Returning from knee rehab — minutes managed through August
players.note: The press-leader. Changes what the front line is when he plays.
